class.name: fr3_motion/JointImpedanceController
class.description: Joint impedance controller that tracks a joint position setpoint received on the "joint_state_setpoint" topic. Based on franka_example_controllers' joint_impedance_example_controller.

class.name: fr3_motion/JointImpedanceWithIKController
class.description: Joint impedance controller with inverse kinematics that tracks an end-effector pose setpoint received on the "ee_pose_setpoint" topic. Based on franka_example_controllers' joint_impedance_with_ik_example_controller.
